creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you please recheck if support for Radeon HD 56xx series is still missing in recent FreeBSD versions?  Note that DRM bits had been moved out of the base system/kernel to the `graphics/drm-*-kmod' and `graphics/gpu-firmware-kmod' ports.

Your report was against 10.2-RELEASE which went out of support long time ago.  Please update to the supported FreeBSD version.

Adding x11@ to CC list so it can be tracked while originally filed under base system/kern.
